features.name: POST /submit Worker route
features.description: Accepts opinion text, reads cf.country + cf.colo, calls Workers AI for sentiment, reports to Durable Object

features.name: GroundswellRoom Durable Object
features.description: Global state hub — stores submissions, manages WebSocket connections, fans out updates, triggers narrator

features.name: Llama 3.3 Sentiment Scoring
features.description: Workers AI call that returns sentiment (-1 to 1) and a 2-3 word theme label

features.name: WebSocket real-time fan-out
features.description: Durable Object pushes new submission events to all connected browser clients instantly

features.name: Live Globe Map (Leaflet)
features.description: React-Leaflet world map — markers appear at country centroids (~80 countries), colored by sentiment (red/yellow/green)

features.name: Submit Bar UI
features.description: One-line opinion input with topic label and submit button; Enter key supported

features.name: AI Narrator Panel
features.description: Llama 3.3 watches global state and generates pattern commentary every 30s or 10 submissions

features.name: Live Feed Sidebar
features.description: Scrolling list of recent submissions with country flag, sentiment indicator, colo, and theme tag

features.name: KV Regional Summary Cache
features.description: Per-country latest sentiment cached in KV with 60s TTL

features.name: In-browser Test Dashboard
features.description: 40+ unit tests for sentiment logic, globe aggregation, WS message handling, and UI helpers; accessible via TESTS button

features.name: Deploy to Cloudflare Pages + Workers
features.description: Frontend on Pages, Worker + DO on Workers, wrangler.toml configured
